title: Search | Depop
memory: The search for "iphone 15 pro 256gb" resulted in zero listings, showing a "Browse Depop" section instead. I have identified the grid display format and filter categories, but only two items from the recommendations were visible; I need to scroll further or re-extract to get the first five titles and prices.

extract.query: Extract the first 5 listings from the 'Browse Depop' section including their titles/descriptions and prices. Also, confirm the listing display format, the location and format of prices, and list all available filter and sorting options.
